title: Monster Tinker
description: Replaces the vanilla mobs' melee weapons and armor with their Tinkers' Construct counterparts
body:
When mobs master the art of tinkering, can you still defeat them?

This datapack replaces the vanilla mobs' vanilla melee weapons and armor with their Tinkers' Construct counterparts upon spawning; skeletons, strays and pillagers have a chance to use Tinkers' Construct arrows when they spawn.
